description: Assign or remove a group name to blocks. If remove is present, the group name will be removed from blocks in the specified range. If < range > is not supplied, all blocks are affected.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign the group name to slot s .
